# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
    tier: backend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: batch-processor
          image: batch-processor:1.0.0
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: data-volume
              mountPath: /data
          env:
            - name: PROCESSING_MODE
              value: "batch"
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 256Mi
        - name: data-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 2Gi
      restartPolicy: Always
